description: 任务编排系统 - 允许用户创建自定义工作流，支持手动/定时触发，执行预注册的动作并记录执行历史

userStories.title: Add task and execution_log tables to database
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store task orchestration and execution logs in the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Add task table with fields: id, name, triggerType ('manual' | 'scheduled'), cronExpression (nullable), enabled (boolean), actionId, actionConfig (JSON), createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
Add execution_log table with fields: id, taskId, status ('success' | 'failed'), startedAt, finishedAt, errorMessage (nullable), errorType (nullable), result (nullable JSON)
Add foreign key from execution_log.taskId to task.id

userStories.title: Implement action registration system
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create an action registration system for registering executable actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Define ActionHandler interface with: id, name, description, paramSchema, execute()
Define ActionResult interface with: success, data?, error?
Create ActionRegistry class with register() and get() methods

userStories.title: Implement task scheduler service
userStories.description: As a system, I need a scheduler to automatically trigger tasks based on CRON expressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Register scheduled tasks based on enabled status
Execute task actions when cron triggers
Handle scheduler startup on app start
Handle graceful shutdown on app stop

userStories.title: Add task CRUD API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I need API endpoints to create, read, update, and delete tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/v1/tasks - Create task with name, triggerType, cronExpression, actionId, actionConfig
GET /api/v1/tasks - List all tasks for current user
DELETE /api/v1/tasks/:id - Delete task and related logs
Validate cron expression format for scheduled tasks

userStories.title: Add manual trigger API endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manually trigger a task to execute immediately.

userStories.title: Add task enable/disable toggle API
userStories.description: As a user, I want to enable or disable a scheduled task.

userStories.title: Add execution log API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want to query execution history for tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/v1/tasks/:id/executions - List execution logs for a task

userStories.title: Create task list frontend page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view all my tasks in a list.
acceptanceCriteria: Display task list with name, triggerType, status, nextRun
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create task form for create/edit
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create or edit a task orchestration.
acceptanceCriteria: Form fields: name, triggerType, cronExpression (for scheduled), actionId, actionConfig
Action selector dropdown showing available actions
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add manual trigger button on task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manually trigger a task from the list.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Execute' button on each task row
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create execution history view
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view execution history for a task.
acceptanceCriteria: Show execution logs with status, startedAt, finishedAt, errorMessage
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add navigation to task orchestration pages
userStories.description: As a user, I want to navigate to the task orchestration feature.
acceptanceCriteria: Add menu item or link to task orchestration in navigation
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
